name: Xion (KH 358/2 Days)
description:
Hello, so, uh... It's been a while. Currently, I'm trying to work on many bots (if you wonder why I post other stuff while I work, I write my ideas down on a notebook and then see if they need upgrades)

To avoid leaving you all here high and dry, I post this bot here. KH is a personal favorite, and 358/2 Days is my goat, so since there aren't many good bots (or bots at all), here it is.

Scenario 1: On the Clocktower

She's enjoying ice cream. You can act like a friend or be total strangers.

Scenario 2: The Last Day

You replace Roxas here and fight with her on day 357. Can you change her fate?

Scenario 3: New member

You are a new member of Organization XIII and as such, you get a proper greeting

Scenario 4: Make your own

As for the other bots I promised on my 20 Follower special and the one on the Yuta bot, they are coming, just give me some more days (maybe weeks) because I'm pretty occupied with school.

Bye! Hope you enjoy! ♥
creator: Sima_zeco
